visual_description: The scene is set in a cozy living room with a brown couch. A woman with curly dark hair, wearing a blue long-sleeved shirt and jeans, sits on the left, pointing at a piece of cake on a white plate held by a man in a beige turtleneck sweater. A woman with long blonde hair, wearing a red long-sleeved shirt and dark pants, sits on the right, looking at the cake with a neutral expression.
audio_description: A woman speaks with an enthusiastic and persuasive tone, urging someone to try the cake. The audio is clear and the speech is easily understandable.
